name: Simple Stripe Shower Curtain Gray/Cream - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Cotton Blend, Dobby Weave, Buttonhole Top
description:
Fill your bathroom with elegant style with this Simple Stripe Shower Curtain from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Boasting a soft, cotton-blend dobby-weave construction, this decorative shower curtain features horizontal stripes in gray on a cream background for classic styling. Featuring a buttonhole top for easy installation, you can toss it in the washing machine for a quick refresh when needed.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
